resources.string: Enter text or use Random sample.
Longer passages stay collapsed here. Open the TXT editor to view or edit the full text.
Use the larger editor for longer lines, notes, or ritual passages before converting them to audio.
This payload could not be interpreted as text. Raw data is still available.
No raw payload data is available yet.
Applies to the next generated audio. Existing generated audio keeps the style it was created with.
Applies to the next generated audio. Existing generated audio keeps the Morse speed it was created with.
No result yet. Tap Read when needed.
Current byte emits 2 symbols: high nibble first, then low nibble
How this byte is being sent
This is the second nibble, so the player will advance to the next byte after it.
Enhanced visuals are not ready for this audio yet.
Text follow is not ready for this audio yet.
Enhanced visuals could not be prepared for this audio.
Text follow could not be prepared for this audio.
The lamp keepers unseal the old star chart
The lamp keepers unseal the old star chart
No audio yet for this mode
Pro accepts ASCII text only. Non-ASCII characters such as CJK text, emoji, and many accented letters cannot be encoded in pro.
This mode accepts the current text as UTF-8/plain text bytes. Mini and pro have stricter input rules.
Mini accepts A-Z, 0-9, spaces, and common Morse punctuation. Lowercase is encoded as uppercase and repeated spaces are folded.
Mini input is ready. It will be encoded as Morse-compatible text.
Pro input is ready. All characters are ASCII.
Extracting text and timing data from this clip. Longer audio may take a while.
Microphone permission is required before recording.
Grant microphone access to record a clip.
Processing failed. Record again and retry.
Ready to record a dry clip for voice processing.
Voice with an added flash-style background track.
Use a supported audio clip such as WAV, MP3, or M4A.
Import failed. Choose another clip and retry.
Choose an audio clip to process.
Live preview stopped. Check your device audio path and retry.
Preferred live output unavailable. Input: %1$s • Actual output: %2$s
Live prefers the phone mic for input and a connected Bluetooth speaker for output. If no Bluetooth output is available, it falls back to the phone speaker.
Record or upload audio before processing.
Original voice with a constant flash-style background track.
Machine voice with short coded sounds between lines.
Clean robot voice with a short metallic echo.
Live mode is currently in early preview. Audio quality and latency may vary as independent development and active optimization remain ongoing. Clip mode is recommended for best results.
Original voice with a flash-style background track that opens only when voice is present.
